usage: editPin [-help] [-end {x y}] [-fixedPin] [-global_location] [-include_rectilinear_edge] [-masterCloneAware] [-offsetEnd <float>] [-offsetStart <float>] [-pinDepth <float>] [-pinWidth <float>] [-quiet] [-skipWrappingPins] [-snap {TRACK USERGRID MGRID}] [-spreadDirection {clockwise counterclockwise both}] [-start { x y}] [-use <string>] [ { -layer {layerId | layerIdList} | {[-layerH <layerId>] [-layerV <layerId>]} } [-layer_priority ] [-assign {x y} | -pattern {fill_track fill_layer fill_optimised fill_diagonal fill_sinusoidal fill_checkerboard}]] [ -side <string> | -edge <integer> ] [ -cell <string> | {-hinst <hinstName> [-refMaster ]} ] [ -fixOverlap [ -honorConstraint ]] [ -pattern {fill_track fill_layer fill_optimised fill_diagonal fill_sinusoidal fill_checkerboard} [ -reverse_alternate ]] [ -spacing <string> [ -unit {MICRON TRACK} ]] [ -assign {x y} | -spreadType {START CENTER SIDE EDGE RANGE} | -pattern {fill_track fill_layer fill_optimised fill_diagonal fill_sinusoidal fill_checkerboard}] [ -pin {pinName | pinNameList} ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -assign
options.description: Preassigns a pin at the specified location.

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the name of the module.

options.name: -edge
options.description: For rectilinear partitions, specifies the edge along which the pins will be placed.

options.name: -end
options.description: For pin spreading along a range, specifies the coordinates where pins should end.

options.name: -fixOverlap
options.description: Bool value true|1 specifies that the pins should be moved to the closest acceptable position such that pins do not overlap and value false|0 will not remove any overlap.

options.name: -fixedPin
options.description: A value of true|1 sets the pin status to Fixed.

options.name: -global_location
options.description: Specifies that all the loc are global

options.name: -hinst
options.description: Specifies the hinst name, including black box or committed partition and top.

options.name: -honorConstraint
options.description: Specifies whether user-defined pin constraints should be honored.

options.name: -include_rectilinear_edge
options.description: Include all edges coming in solution space.

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the layer on which the pins will be assigned.

options.name: -layerH
options.description: Specifies the preferred horizontal layer on which the pins will be assigned.

options.name: -layerV
options.description: Specifies the preferred vertical layer on which the pins will be assigned.

options.name: -layer_priority
options.description: Specifies that the input layer is given based on its priority.

options.name: -masterCloneAware
options.description: To enable master-clone-context aware for feasibility checking

options.name: -offsetEnd
options.description: Sets the offset from the end of edge or side (in microns) to be considered as end point for placing the pin.

options.name: -offsetStart
options.description: Sets the offset from the start of edge or side (in microns) to be considered as start point for placing the pin.

options.name: -pattern
options.description: {fill_track fill_layer fill_optimised fill_diagonal fill_sinusoidal fill_checkerboard} Specifies the multi-layer-spread-pattern to be followed by the set of selected pins.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the pins, or the list of pins of the specified module on which the command will run.

options.name: -pinDepth
options.description: Sets the depth of the pin in microns.

options.name: -pinWidth
options.description: Sets the width of the pin in microns.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: To suppress messages

options.name: -refMaster
options.description: Specifies that edge, spreadDirection, offset are with respect to master

options.name: -reverse_alternate
options.description: Reverse of specified multi-layer-spread-pattern.

options.name: -side
options.description: For rectangular partitions, specifies the side on which the pins will be placed.

options.name: -skipWrappingPins
options.description: For skipping pin wrapping on adjacent edge or same edge from other side

options.name: -snap
options.description: Specifies how the pins will be snapped.

options.name: -spacing
options.description: Displays the spacing between pins for multi-pin editing.

options.name: -spreadDirection
options.description: {clockwise counterclockwise both} Specifies the direction of pin placement from the start location along the partition fence.

options.name: -spreadType
options.description: {START CENTER SIDE EDGE RANGE} Specifies how to spread pins along a block's edge.

options.name: -start
options.description: For pin spreading along a range, specifies the coordinates where pins should start.

options.name: -unit
options.description: Specifies the unit in microns or in tracks.

options.name: -use
options.description: Specifies the +USE property of the partition pin.
